channel.title: Applications on Hayden's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Applications on Hayden's Blog

item.title: Fire-Tools
item.description: Fire Tools is a powerful tool that debloats and installs Google services on Amazon Fire Tablets to make them feel snappier and increase ease of use. In addition it also supports installing custom launchers such as Nova, Lawnchair, or any .apk. If you wish to install all your own apps at once theres a batch installer. It’s as easy as dropping all your .apk & .apkm files in the Batch folder and clicking the Batch Install button!

item.title: WinHancer
item.description: WinHancer - The Windows Enhancer Tool to debloat and assist with the setup of Windows How to Run Paste This Command Into Powershell (Admin) or Windows Terminal (Admin): iwr -useb https://github.com/mrhaydendp/WinHancer/raw/master/WinHancer.ps1 | iex Changes Over CTTs win10script Redesigned UI to integrate with Windows 11’s theme Tooltips when hovering over buttons Rewrote and simplified most backend functions Swapped buttons with toggles to save space Integrated my RemoveEdge script Added installers for Snappy Driver Installer Origin and MPV Added a batch install feature for Winget applications Made debloat (essential tweaks) less heavy handed
